'''yavongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whacker|whacker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whacker|whacker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yavongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yævengeth|yævengeth]] || [[word:yævengej|yævengej]] || [[word:yævengesh|yævengesh]] || [[word:yævenge|yævenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavovongoth|yavovongoth]] || [[word:yavovongoj|yavovongoj]] || [[word:yavovongosh|yavovongosh]] || [[word:yavovongo|yavovongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavongoth|yavongoth]] || [[word:yavongoj|yavongoj]] || [[word:yavongosh|yavongosh]] || [[word:yavongo|yavongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavofngoth|yavofngoth]] || [[word:yavofngoj|yavofngoj]] || [[word:yavofngosh|yavofngosh]] || [[word:yavofngof|yavofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yavongotho|yavongotho]] || [[word:yavongojo|yavongojo]] || [[word:yavongosho|yavongosho]] || [[word:yavongoko|yavongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yavongoth|yavongoth]] || [[word:yavongoj|yavongoj]] || [[word:yavongosh|yavongosh]] || [[word:yavongo|yavongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yavongothol|yavongothol]] || [[word:yavongojol|yavongojol]] || [[word:yavongoshol|yavongoshol]] || [[word:yavongokol|yavongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yavongothotho|yavongothotho]] || [[word:yavongojojo|yavongojojo]] || [[word:yavongoshosho|yavongoshosho]] || [[word:yavongoko|yavongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yavongothon|yavongothon]] || [[word:yavongojon|yavongojon]] || [[word:yavongoshon|yavongoshon]] || [[word:yavongokon|yavongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yavongothoro|yavongothoro]] || [[word:yavongojoro|yavongojoro]] || [[word:yavongoshoro|yavongoshoro]] || [[word:yavongokoro|yavongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
